title: Pork Skewers with Filipino Flair
description: Grilled pork skewers infused with the bold flavors of the Philippines, perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine 2 cloves garlic, 1 tablespoon fish sauce, 1 tablespoon vinegar, 1 tablespoon brown sugar, and 1 teaspoon black pepper. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the pork cubes and the marinade. Mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread 5-6 pieces of pork onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
Note: If using a charcoal grill, make sure to cook the skewers over medium heat to prevent burning.
If using a gas grill, cook the skewers over medium-high heat for a nice char.
